overall.description: A static third-person gameplay scene from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt standing in a medieval stone courtyard at night. Guards in red and white uniforms stand near a burning brazier, illuminating the cobblestone ground and weathered stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone courtyard with burning brazier

agents.ego_description: standing still in the courtyard observing the surrounding guards and environment

notable_agents.action: guard standing at attention with arms crossed
guard standing near the fire with hand on weapon

entered.detail: weathered medieval stone wall with small windows
tall stone building facade with wooden scaffolding attached
large metal fire pit with bright orange flames casting warm light
rough wooden planks and beams leaning against the wall
dark arched stone entrance between the two buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a narrow enclosed medieval courtyard at night, surrounded by tall stone walls. A burning brazier on the right provides the primary light source, casting flickering orange light across the cobblestone ground. Two guards in red and white uniforms stand watch while a seated figure rests in the background near a stone doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective within a narrow medieval courtyard at night, focusing on the interplay between deep shadows and flickering firelight. It begins by capturing the enclosed atmosphere of the space, where tall stone walls hem in the cobblestone ground. As the camera lingers, the primary light source from a burning brazier on the right casts shifting orange glows across the scene. The view then encompasses two guards in red and white uniforms standing watch, before finally settling on a seated figure resting in the background near a weathered stone doorway.
